zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzGeoffrey於1152年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特時，她的父親Roger FitzGeoffrey36歲，母親Alice de Turberville32歲。她於大約1173年與John de Mautravers I在英國英格蘭多瑟特列可姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1227年在英國英格蘭多瑟特列可姆享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzGeoffrey于1152年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特时，她的父亲Roger FitzGeoffrey36岁，母亲Alice de Turberville32岁。她于大约1173年与John de Mautravers I在英国英格兰多瑟特列可姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1227年在英国英格兰多瑟特列可姆享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzGeoffrey was born in 1152, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger FitzGeoffrey, was 36 and her mother, Alice de Turberville, was 32. She married John de Mautravers I about 1173, in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1227, in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzGeoffrey est née en 1152, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger FitzGeoffrey, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice de Turberville, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mautravers I environ 1173, à Lewcombe, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1227, à Lewcombe, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzGeoffrey 1152 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger FitzGeoffrey 36 und ihre Mutter Alice de Turberville 32. Sie hat um 1173 in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom John de Mautravers I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1227 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzGeoffrey è nata il nel 1152 nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger FitzGeoffrey, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alice de Turberville, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John de Mautravers I circa 1173, nel Lewcombe, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1227, nel Lewcombe, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzGeoffreyが1152年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Roger FitzGeoffreyは36歳，母Alice de Turbervilleは32歳であった。約1173年にイギリスイギリスドールセトルコンベでJohn de Mautravers Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1227年にイギリスイギリスドールセトルコンベで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzGeoffrey(이)가 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger FitzGeoffrey(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Turberville(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1173년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 루코브에서 John de Mautravers I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 루코브에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzGeoffrey nasceu em 1152, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger FitzGeoffrey, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Turberville, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Mautravers I aproximadamente 1173, em Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1227, em Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzGeoffrey родилась в 1152 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger FitzGeoffrey было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Turberville, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mautravers I около 1173 г. в местности львкомб, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1227 г. в местности львкомб, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice FitzGeoffrey nació en 1152, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger FitzGeoffrey, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice de Turberville, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John de Mautravers I aproximadamente 1173, en Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1227, en Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
